Sirius

An educational solar system site for a broad audience with accessible, engaging content.

Problem

Make dense astronomy content approachable for ages 14–100 with clear navigation and visual hierarchy.

Approach

Designed a simple content structure with clear entry points.

Built reusable layout blocks to keep pages consistent.

Optimized for readability across devices.

Role & Tools

Role: UX, UI, front‑end build

Tools: HTML/CSS, JavaScript
